title: HutoolCore
description: Provides a configuration file management and online configuration file modification function
body:
> 请注意，本 Mod 为多加载器支持 Mod（即 Mod 文件可同时被多个加载器识别并加载），当前支持以下几种加载器：Fabric, Quilt, Forge, Bukkit (Paper), Ignite。  
> Please note that this Mod is a multi-loader supported Mod (i.e. Mod files can be recognised and loaded by multiple loaders at the same time) and currently supports the following loaders: Fabric, Quilt, Forge, Bukkit (Paper), Ignite.

本Mod提供一个轻量自动化配置文件管理和 Web 配置文件编辑。    
This Mod provides a lightweight automated configuration file management and web profile editing.  

WebConfig是一种特殊的配置方式，使用web的方式动态更改配置文件，但请注意，大多数配置项需要重启游戏。WebConfig支持基本HTTP验证。  
WebConfig is a special configuration method that uses the web to dynamically change configuration files, but please note that most configuration items require a restart of the game. webConfig supports basic HTTP authentication.

配置文件预览 Configuration file preview ：
![Image](https://github.com/KenRouKoro/HutoolCore/raw/master/img.png)
